title: encyclia bracteata
intro: Encyclia bracteata, also known as the Bracted Encyclia, is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. This epiphytic orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Encyclia bracteata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments.
